name: Check Into Cash
description_short: Maricopa's Check Into Cash location at 21083 N John Wayne Pkwy offers fast payday and title loans Mon–Sat.
description_long:
Check Into Cash's Maricopa, AZ location sits at 21083 N John Wayne Parkway, Suite C102, easily accessible to residents throughout the area. The storefront is a standalone location offering face-to-face service for quick loans. Hours are Monday 9 AM–7 PM, Tuesday–Thursday 9 AM–6 PM, Friday 9 AM–7 PM, and Saturday 10 AM–4 PM; closed Sundays.

At this Maricopa branch, you can apply for payday loans, title loans, and other short-term lending options. Call 520-568-9296 to speak with a representative about your borrowing needs or to ask about required documentation.

If you live or work in Maricopa, AZ and need quick access to cash for unexpected expenses, this Check Into Cash location provides in-person guidance and transparent lending terms. Bring a valid ID, proof of income, and your bank account information to speed up the application process.
address: 21083 N John Wayne Pkwy Ste C102, Maricopa, AZ 85139

company_info.headquarters: 21083 N John Wayne Pkwy Ste C102, Maricopa, AZ 85139

pros: Same-day cash availability upon approval for in-store applicants
Accepts customers with bad or no credit history
Willingness to cash checks that other businesses refuse
Extended operating hours including Friday 8am-7pm and Saturday 9am-4pm availability
Multiple loan types available (payday, installment, title, Flex Line of Credit)
30 years of operational history and established physical locations
Additional financial services (Western Union, bill pay, tax prep, debit cards)
cons: APR and fee information not transparently displayed on main website pages; customers must request details or navigate to state-specific pages
Payday and title loans are inherently high-cost products that often trap borrowers in debt cycles requiring repeated borrowing
Maximum payday loan amount of $600 is very small and may not cover substantial emergencies
Title loans require putting vehicle at risk as collateral, creating hardship if repayment fails
No mention of financial counseling, debt management education, or payday alternative programs despite 30-year history
best_for: Employed individuals with bad credit facing small, urgent expenses who can repay within weeks
People without access to traditional bank credit who need same-day physical cash disbursement
Workers needing check cashing services at locations that reject their paychecks
Borrowers willing to use car title as collateral for larger cash needs beyond payday loan limits
diagnosis: Check Into Cash is appropriate for employed individuals with poor credit facing genuine short-term emergencies (car repair, medical bill, utility shutoff) who can repay within 2-4 weeks and have verified income. The critical caveat: these are high-cost loans that should never be used for non-emergency expenses or budgeting shortfalls, and borrowers must obtain complete fee/APR disclosure before applying, as rates are deliberately obscured on the main website.
services: Installment loans with extended repayment terms
Flex Line of Credit for repeated borrowing
Check cashing including checks competitors refuse
Green Dot Visa debit card accounts
meta_description: Maricopa, AZ – Check Into Cash, 21083 N John Wayne Pkwy. Fast payday and title loans.
